We value your privacy

We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized ads or content, and analyze our traffic. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies.

Customize Accept All

Customize Consent Preferences![Image 2](https://cdn-cookieyes.com/assets/images/close.svg)

We use cookies to help you navigate efficiently and perform certain functions. You will find detailed information about all cookies under each consent category below.

The cookies that are categorized as "Necessary" are stored on your browser as they are essential for enabling the basic functionalities of the site. ...Show more

Necessary Always Active

Necessary cookies are required to enable the basic features of this site, such as providing secure log-in or adjusting your consent preferences. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable data.

*   Cookie wpEmojiSettingsSupports 
*   Duration session 
*   Description WordPress sets this cookie when a user interacts with emojis on a WordPress site. It helps determine if the user's browser can display emojis properly. 

*   Cookie cookieyes-consent 
*   Duration 1 year 
*   Description CookieYes sets this cookie to remember users' consent preferences so that their preferences are respected on subsequent visits to this site. It does not collect or store any personal information about the site visitors. 

Functional

Functional cookies help perform certain functionalities like sharing the content of the website on social media platforms, collecting feedback, and other third-party features.

No cookies to display.

Analytics

- [x] 

Analytical cookies are used to understand how visitors interact with the website. These cookies help provide information on metrics such as the number of visitors, bounce rate, traffic source, etc.

*   Cookie _gcl_au 
*   Duration 3 months 
*   Description Google Tag Manager sets the cookie to experiment advertisement efficiency of websites using their services. 

*   Cookie CLID 
*   Duration 1 year 
*   Description Microsoft Clarity set this cookie to store information about how visitors interact with the website. The cookie helps to provide an analysis report. The data collection includes the number of visitors, where they visit the website, and the pages visited. 

*   Cookie _fbp 
*   Duration 3 months 
*   Description Facebook sets this cookie to display advertisements when either on Facebook or on a digital platform powered by Facebook advertising after visiting the website. 

*   Cookie _ga_* 
*   Duration 1 year 1 month 4 days 
*   Description Google Analytics sets this cookie to store and count page views. 

*   Cookie _ga 
*   Duration 1 year 1 month 4 days 
*   Description Google Analytics sets this cookie to calculate visitor, session and campaign data and track site usage for the site's analytics report. The cookie stores information anonymously and assigns a randomly generated number to recognise unique visitors. 

*   Cookie _clck 
*   Duration 1 year 
*   Description Microsoft Clarity sets this cookie to retain the browser's Clarity User ID and settings exclusive to that website. This guarantees that actions taken during subsequent visits to the same website will be linked to the same user ID. 

*   Cookie _clsk 
*   Duration 1 day 
*   Description Microsoft Clarity sets this cookie to store and consolidate a user's pageviews into a single session recording. 

*   Cookie SM 
*   Duration session 
*   Description Microsoft Clarity cookie set this cookie for synchronizing the MUID across Microsoft domains. 

*   Cookie MR 
*   Duration 7 days 
*   Description This cookie, set by Bing, is used to collect user information for analytics purposes. 

Performance

- [x] 

Performance cookies are used to understand and analyze the key performance indexes of the website which helps in delivering a better user experience for the visitors.

*   Cookie SRM_B 
*   Duration 1 year 24 days 
*   Description Used by Microsoft Advertising as a unique ID for visitors. 

Advertisement

- [x] 

Advertisement cookies are used to provide visitors with customized advertisements based on the pages you visited previously and to analyze the effectiveness of the ad campaigns.

*   Cookie MUID 
*   Duration 1 year 24 days 
*   Description Bing sets this cookie to recognise unique web browsers visiting Microsoft sites. This cookie is used for advertising, site analytics, and other operations. 

*   Cookie ANONCHK 
*   Duration 10 minutes 
*   Description The ANONCHK cookie, set by Bing, is used to store a user's session ID and verify ads' clicks on the Bing search engine. The cookie helps in reporting and personalization as well. 

Save My Preferences Accept All

# Baan Thai, Best Thai Restaurant in Ireland.

[Baan Thai Ballsbridge Open from 2pm on Saturday 22nd November 2025 20% off a la carte for Collections Coeliac-Friendly, Halal & Vegan Book a table](https://www.foodbooking.com/ordering/restaurant/menu/reservation?restaurant_uid=1fc507bd-b0b0-4e78-8946-4ba0e7422394&reservation=true)

## Our Location

Our Ballsbridge restaurant is uniquely designed as historical Thai house. Rich in history and culture to welcome you to an immersive Thai dining experience.

## Ballsbridge (Dublin City Centre)

### **Opening Hours:**

**Saturday 22nd November 2025 Match Day – open from 2pm**

**Dinner Service:

Sunday – Thursday: 5.30pm – 10.30pm;**

**Friday – Saturday: 5.30pm – 11pm**

**Click & Collect Service:Monday – Sunday: 5.30pm – 10.30pm**

### **Parking:**

On street sparking outside the restaurant.

### **Phone:**

[01-6608833](tel:+35316608833)

[01-6608355](tel:+35316608355)

### **Email:**

[baanthaiballsbridge@gmail.com](mailto:baanthaiballsbridge@gmail.com)

![Image 6: crown](https://www.baanthai.ie/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/goldcrown-1-e1581346029425.png)

## Why us

![Image 7: crown](https://www.baanthai.ie/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/goldcrown-2-e1581346132952.png)

*   **Flavour** - With over 25 years' experience we continue to dedicate ourselves to preserving the authentic flavours of Thailand.
*   **Culture** - Walking into Baan Thai feels like you have stepped into ancient Thailand, immersed in historical architecture, traditional music and crafts.
*   **Health** - Thai Medicinal Herbs “Samoon Prai” are abundant in our dishes. Used for both their unique flavours in cooking and health benefits.
*   **Home** - “Baan Thai” means “Thai Home”. We are Ireland’s 1st Thai-owned restaurant dedicated to welcoming guests to enjoy wholesome food together.

[More about the Symbols](https://www.baanthai.iev2/about/)

![Image 8: crown](https://www.baanthai.ie/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/goldcrown-1-e1581346029425.png)

## About Us

![Image 9: crown](https://www.baanthai.ie/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/goldcrown-2-e1581346132952.png)

*   **Family** - There is nothing we enjoy more than getting together with family to create and eat delicious meals. Both our restaurants are family owned.
*   **Heritage** - Heritage helps us to remember who we are. We are deeply connected to our Thai-Ireland community and often host Buddhist ceremonies.
*   **Tradition** - At Baan Thai we carry our traditions into our daily working lives. From the Buddhist eight-fold path to our national Thai silk cultural dress.
*   **Harmony** - Harmony is deeply rooted in our culture and is seen in our cooking too. The art of Thai cuisine is a delicate balance of robust flavours.

[More about the Symbols](https://www.baanthai.iev2/about/)

![Image 10: crown](https://www.baanthai.ie/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/crown-top-small.png)

## OUR SPECIALITY

![Image 11: crown](https://www.baanthai.ie/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/crown-down-small.png)

![Image 12: Duck Tamarind](https://www.baanthai.ie/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Duck-Tamarind-768x427.jpg)

## Duck Tamarind

Roasted Half Duck on a bed of crispy noodles, topped with our tangy home made Tamarind sauce

[VIEW DETAILS](https://www.baanthai.ie/#)

![Image 13: Cropped Seabass Choo Chee](https://www.baanthai.ie/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Cropped-Seabass-Choo-Chee-1-768x427.jpg)

## Seabass Choo Chee

Crispy Whole Seabass filleted topped with coconut creamed red curry sauce, shredded lime leaves & basil

[VIEW DETAILS](https://www.baanthai.ie/#)

![Image 14: Duck Red Curry](https://www.baanthai.ie/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Duck-Red-Curry-768x427.jpg)

## Red Curry

A blend of red chillies, [Thai herbs](https://www.facebook.com/BaanThaiLeopardstown/photos/a.125821151865/10158372115836866/?type=3)& spices, coconut milk, bamboo shoots, peppers & pea. Customised to your liking with one of the following: Tender Chicken Breast, Succulent Beef, Tofu and Seasonal Veg, Delicious Duck, Pacific Prawns or Fresh Seabass

[VIEW DETAILS](https://www.baanthai.ie/#)

![Image 15: Seabass Chilli and Lime](https://www.baanthai.ie/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Seabass-Chilli-and-Lime-768x427.jpg)

## Seabass Chilli & Lime

Steamed Seabass with lime, chilli, garlic, celery & coriander – A Thai classic

[VIEW DETAILS](https://www.baanthai.ie/#)

![Image 16: crown](https://www.baanthai.ie/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/goldcrown-1-e1581346029425.png)

## Sample Menu

![Image 17: crown](https://www.baanthai.ie/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/goldcrown-2-e1581346132952.png)

## Lunch

![Image 18](https://zakrademos.com/restaurant/wp-content/uploads/sites/20/2019/05/breakfast-blackpasta.jpg)

## Chicken Satay

Skewered, chicken breast marinated in curry spices with a spicy home-made peanut sauce.

## $100

![Image 19](https://zakrademos.com/restaurant/wp-content/uploads/sites/20/2019/05/breakfast-applepie.jpg)

## Pad Thai

Rice noodles stir fried, egg, spring onion, ground peanut & bean sprouts with home-made tamarind sauce.

## $100

![Image 20](https://zakrademos.com/restaurant/wp-content/uploads/sites/20/2019/05/breakfast-avocado-egg-toast.jpg)

## Yellow Curry

A blend of turmeric, Thai spices & herbs cooked with, onion & potato in coconut milk.

## $100

![Image 21](https://zakrademos.com/restaurant/wp-content/uploads/sites/20/2019/05/breakfasi-blueberry-pie.jpg)

## Cashew Nuts & Spring Onion Stir Fry

with seasonal vegetables, garlic, peppers & dried chillies.

## $110

## Dinner

![Image 22](https://zakrademos.com/restaurant/wp-content/uploads/sites/20/2019/05/lunch-item1.jpg)

## Prawn Tempura

Pacific prawns in light Tempura w/ plum sauce

## $120

![Image 23](https://zakrademos.com/restaurant/wp-content/uploads/sites/20/2019/05/lunch-item2.jpg)

## Green Curry

A blend of green chillies, Thai herbs & spices, bamboo shoots, peppers, pea in coconut milk

## $110

![Image 24](https://zakrademos.com/restaurant/wp-content/uploads/sites/20/2019/05/lunch-item3.jpg)

## Larb Gai

Ground chicken fillet spicy salad. Mixed w/ roasted rice, chillies, Thai herbs & lime. Served w/ iceberg lettuce

## $100

![Image 25](https://zakrademos.com/restaurant/wp-content/uploads/sites/20/2019/05/lunch-item4.jpg)

## Half Duck on a Sizzling Hot Plate

Roasted half duck on a bed of sautéed seasonal vegetables,light soya, in a sizzling hot plate

## $160

[VIEW ALL](https://zakrademos.com/restaurant/menus/)

![Image 26: crown](https://www.baanthai.ie/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/crown-top-small.png)

### TESTIMONIAL

![Image 27: crown](https://www.baanthai.ie/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/crown-down-small.png)

 "My favourite Thai Restaurant in Dublin, always consistently great food, friendly staff and never disappointed. I bring clients there for meals and friends there for catch up lunch/dinner. If you haven't tried it yet then you must go. Be warned to book in advance as this is a busy place and a local favourite. ![Image 28: 😉](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/16.0.1/svg/1f609.svg)![Image 29: 👍](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/16.0.1/svg/1f44d.svg)" 

![Image 30: Baan Thai restaurant in Ireland](https://www.baanthai.ie/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/baanthai_branding_goldpdf-08.svg)

Google Review for Baan Thai Ballsbridge

 "Authentic Thai food. So good, I'm almost loathe to recommend it in case it gets too busy and I can't get a table! Great food, great service, reasonably priced" 

![Image 31: Baan Thai restaurant in Ireland](https://www.baanthai.ie/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/baanthai_branding_goldpdf-08.svg)

Google Review for Baan Thai Leopardstown

 "Wow wow wow! Everything about this place compliments the wonderful food. The exciting e-San Thai music from the northern region and the rich dark interior home the delicious generous Thai delights, some of the best food outside of Thailand I've ever eaten. Get the Jumbo Prawns with tamarind sauce for an extra special treat. Thai green curry was great too! Check out the photos! Get the sorbet to cut through after before you head out!"

 "Had a few meals there with a chef, they were impressed, do was I."

 "Authentic Thai food at very reasonable prices, this place is a staple of the area since ages ago. They serve food 'medium spicy' by default (that's Thai levels of spicy, not Irish). You almost have to sign a disclaimer to get the 'jungle curry' but damn it's good." 

![Image 36: Baan Thai restaurant in Ireland](https://www.baanthai.ie/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/baanthai_branding_goldpdf-08.svg)

Google Review for Baan Thai Ballsbridge

 "This is a little oasis in the cleaming high rises of Central Park. The décor is something to behold, transporting you well away when you enter. The staff are friendly, with a good sense of humour and great, attentive service. And then the food arrives and it's all just perfect! (The lunch and early bird deals are terrific value too!)"

## GALLERY

![Image 43: crown](https://www.baanthai.ie/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/goldcrown-2-e1581346132952.png)

[![Image 44: Baan Thai Logo](https://www.baanthai.ie/wp-content/uploads/2020/01/Baan-Thai-D1-01.png)](https://www.baanthai.ie/)

Baan Thai believe in and are truly passionate about Thai and Irish culture and are one of the leading Thai restaurants in Ireland whose owners are regularly involved with The Thai Ireland Association whose aim is to promote and foster an awareness and appreciation of the Thai culture including activities of Thai people in Ireland.

“Something that this area needs is more quality restaurants, and Baan Thai really is a trail blazer.”
